mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset_column_def ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM asset_column_def WHERE column_key = #{columnKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_column_def SET column_label = #{columnLabel}, update_time = NOW() WHERE column_key = #{columnKey}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM asset_record WHERE asset_code = #{assetCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_record SET asset_name = #{assetName}, status = #{status}, location = #{location}, note = #{note}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE asset_record SET note = #{note}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE asset_record SET locked = #{locked}, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE asset_record SET latest_transfer_request_id = #{requestId}, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql:
AND a.deleted = 0
AND ( a.asset_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.note LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM asset_record_value v WHERE v.asset_id = a.id AND v.column_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
AND a.locked = #{lockStatus}
AND a.status = #{status}
AND a.asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{assetName}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM asset_record_value cv WHERE cv.asset_id = a.id
AND cv.column_key IN
#{key}
AND cv.column_key = 'col_校区'
AND cv.column_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{campus}, '%') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM asset_record_value uv WHERE uv.asset_id = a.id
AND uv.column_key IN
#{key}
AND uv.column_key = 'col_使用人'
AND uv.column_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user}, '%') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM asset_record_value mv WHERE mv.asset_id = a.id
AND mv.column_key IN
#{key}
AND mv.column_key = 'col_型号'
AND mv.column_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{model}, '%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.* FROM asset_record a WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY
a.asset_code a.asset_name a.status a.location a.locked a.update_time
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM asset_record a WHERE 1=1

SELECT a.* FROM asset_record a WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC

SELECT asset_id, column_key, column_value FROM asset_record_value WHERE asset_id IN
#{assetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_record_value(asset_id, column_key, column_value) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{columnKey}, #{columnValue}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE column_value = VALUES(column_value), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM asset_record a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND ( a.asset_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM asset_record_value v WHERE v.asset_id = a.id AND v.column_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) ORDER BY a.update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM asset_transfer_request WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM asset_transfer_request r WHERE 1=1
AND ( r.asset_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.transfer_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.applicant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT * FROM asset_transfer_request WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT id FROM asset_transfer_request WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} AND status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_record SET latest_transfer_request_id = #{requestId}, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{assetId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset_transfer_export_file WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'READY' AND expire_at > #{now} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM asset_transfer_export_file WHERE download_token = #{downloadToken} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_transfer_export_file SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'READY' AND expire_at <= #{now}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT asset_name FROM asset_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND asset_name IS NOT NULL AND asset_name != '' ORDER BY asset_name ASC
SELECT DISTINCT column_value FROM asset_record_value WHERE column_key = #{columnKey} AND column_value IS NOT NULL AND column_value != '' ORDER BY column_value ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_record SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = #{deletedTime}, deleted_by = #{operatorId}, purge_after_time = #{purgeAfterTime}, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE asset_record SET deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, purge_after_time = NULL, update_by = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM asset_record WHERE deleted = 1
AND ( asset_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
